title: Login page not loading
description: Users report that the login page fails to load intermittently.

title: Error 500 on checkout
description: Checkout throws a server error when adding multiple items.

title: Profile picture upload fails
description: Users cannot upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Notification emails delayed
description: Some users are receiving notifications hours late.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Reset link expires immediately after generation.

title: Search results incorrect
description: Search results do not match the query keywords.

title: Mobile app crashes on launch
description: App crashes immediately on Android devices.

title: Incorrect billing amount
description: Invoices show wrong totals for some customers.

title: Slow page load on dashboard
description: Dashboard takes too long to load for users with large datasets.

title: Typo in terms and conditions
description: Spelling error in the last paragraph of T&C.
